name: Cookies and Cream Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
- The cream-filled cookies should be finely ground.
- Combine the cookie crumbs and margarine; press onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
- Soften the gelatin in water; stir until dissolved over low heat.
- Combine the cream cheese and sugar, mixing well on an electric mixer.
- Gradually add the gelatin mixture and milk, mixing until well combined.
- Chill until the mixture is thickened but not set.
- Fold in the whipped cream. Reserve 1 1/2 cups of the cream cheese mixture.
- Pour the remaining cream cheese mixture over the crust.
- Top with the cookies and reserved cream cheese mixture.
- Chill until firm.
